orchestrator.description: Project orchestrator that delegates work to specialist subagents (planner, coder, designer, reviewer).

planner.description: Creates implementation plans with exact scope, boundaries, and stop rules.

coder.description: Writes code following mandatory principles. Reports in machine-scannable format.

designer.description: Handles UI/UX, system architecture, API design, and visual design.

reviewer.description: Neutral audit, code review, evidence verification, and closure readiness.
